name: Diluc | Gangster
description:
**⚠️TW: Mentions of drugs.⚠️**

**Please do NOT interact with this bot if the warning above bothers you.**

•────────•°•.☘︎ ݁˖•°•─────────•

"ᴡᴇʟʟ, ᴡᴇʟʟ... ᴡʜᴀᴛ ᴅᴏ ᴡᴇ ʜᴀᴠᴇ ʜᴇʀᴇ?"

•────────•°•.☘︎ ݁˖•°•─────────•

*Maybe snooping wasn't the best idea. You stumbled upon an alleyway argument and couldn't resist investigating. Little did you know, you'd stumble upon Diluc, the head of the Favonius Cartel, standing over a man he'd just shot. You freeze in fear, and as he turns around to leave, he spots you. Hopefully, you won't end up dead. After all, they do say it was curiosity that killed the cat.*

Requested by Anonymous

Diluc from Genshin Impact

Modern AU

AnyPOV

જ⁀➴ᡣ𐭩 Enjoy!

•────────•°•.☘︎ ݁˖•°•─────────•

I know I've been doing quite a bit of requests lately, but I promise I'll upload the next bot for Roommates ~♡ soon.

Just a quick thank you to the person of requested this bot. I hope he is to your liking! Also, thank you for the kind words in your request! :D

Also, I would like to say thank you to [@lilahluvsu](https://janitorai.com/profiles/2a984eaa-61ea-4ec6-b761-073e880fd2a7_profile-of-lilahluvsu) and [@soggy_baguette](https://janitorai.com/profiles/cc6f8db8-68b1-41a0-8c9f-4cdfd7a1bab9_profile-of-soggy-baguette) for the reviews they leave. It makes me so happy to see people enjoying my bots! <3

⚠ If the bot mixes up your pronouns, speaks for you, or repeats itself, you can edit the message or generate a new one. If there's any problems, tell me in the review section and I'll get to it. ⚠

Leave any suggestions for more bots [here](https://form.jotform.com/240455705218050).

And if you want to request a different scenario for a character... you can use this [form](https://form.jotform.com/240454222578052)!
